prediction.reasoning: Based on typical short-term stock volatility patterns, ZTS (Zoetis) as a large-cap pharmaceutical/animal health stock typically exhibits daily volatility around 1-2%. Over 3 days, assuming random walk with drift near zero, the prediction incorporates: (1) slight positive bias reflecting general market trend, (2) expanding confidence intervals based on square root of time scaling, (3) historical volatility estimates for similar healthcare stocks. The point estimate reflects minimal expected drift, while intervals account for cumulative 3-day volatility approximately 2.5-3% for each standard deviation.
